jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Wipro
jsonLd.description:
Wipro has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Bhopal office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wipro:
Wipro is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wipro!
